rulings.Case Title: ROCHELLE VAUGHN et al VS. WALTER WORSHAM
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, May 11, 2015, line 1. DEFENDANT MOISES' MONGALO DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT Continued to June 11, 2015. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C and provide courtesy copy of the operative complaint to Department 501 no later than May 22, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ARKADY BERGER VS. GARY VARUM ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Document Requests And Compel Production Of Documents
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, May 11, 2015, line 2. PLAINTIFF ARKADY BERGER's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Document Requests And Compel Production Of Documents Transferred to Department 301 to be heard on May 29, 2015 at 9:00 a.m. All future Discovery motions should be calendared for Department 301. All law and motion matters should be calendared in Department 302. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 1049 MARKET STREET LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. CHAD POTTER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, May 11, 2015, line 3. DEFENDANT JUAN ESCOBEDO and BEN CADY's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED. Plaintiff's Complaint alleges sufficient facts to state causes of action for both ejectment and quantum meruit. (CCP § 425.10). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 1049 MARKET STREET LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. CHAD POTTER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, May 11, 2015, line 3. DEFENDANT BOGDAN MARCOL and PATRICK COOK's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED. Plaintiff's Complaint alleges sufficient facts to state causes of action for both ejectment and quantum meruit. (CCP § 425.10). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: FEDERAL NATIONAL MORTGAGE ASSOCIATION, A/K/A VS. ROMEO BAFUL et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, May 11, 2015, line 4. PLAINTIFF FEDERAL NATIONAL MORTGAGE ASSOCIATION's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED. Moving party shifted its burden. Opposing party failed to submit competent evidence to create a triable issue of fact. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BIANA CHERNOGUZ VS. GUILLERMO MANZANARES ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, May 11, 2015, line 5. DEFENDANT GUILLERMO MANZANARES' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. First Amended Complaint sufficiently alleges breach of a provision of the oral rental agreement ("under the terms of the his oral rental agreement with the former owners, he was to be sole occupant at the Subject property and the building manager."). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Order Deeming Admitted Truth Of Of Facts And Imposing Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, May 11, 2015, line 6. PLAINTIFF BRENDA MCCLENDON's Motion For Order Deeming Admitted Truth Of Facts And Imposing Sanctions OFF CALENDAR, settled. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK N.A. VS. KEYHAN MOHANNA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, May 11, 2015, line 7. DEFENDANT KEYHAN MOHANNA's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Moving party improperly raises issues of fact that do not appear on the face of the complaint or in the judicially noticeable documents. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: N. R. PATEL VS. JAMES WILSON ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, May 11, 2015, line 8. DEFENDANT JAMES WILSON's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Notice is sufficient and is not uncertain. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PAUL KAVANAGH VS. KADHIM TUWARISH ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, May 11, 2015, line 9. DEFENDANT ZAYNAB AL-ZIYAD's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT GRANTED. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PAUL O'GRADY VS. EUGENIA FEDOSEYEVA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, May 11, 2015, line 10. DEFENDANT EUGENIA FEDOSEYEVA's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT The Court is treating this motion as a motion for judgment on the pleadings. The Motion for Judgment on the Pleadings is granted with leave to amend for Plaintiff to clearly allege whether this tenancy is subject to SFRO or is exempt from SFRO. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PAUL O'GRADY VS. EUGENIA FEDOSEYEVA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Cont. Hearing On Motion For Summary Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, May 11, 2015, line 10. PLAINTIFF PAUL O'GRADY's Motion To Continue Hearing On Motion For Summary Judgment OFF CALENDAR, untimely CCP 1005. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ELPIDIO GOMEZ VS. NINO ANDRINI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, May 11, 2015, line 11. DEFENDANT NINO ANDRINI's MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS DENIED. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer. The legal effect of the contract is alleged and it is not required that the lease be attached to the complaint based on non-payment of rent. = (501/REQ)
